data.name: Usage
data.value:
IoTDeploy CLI – deployment via GitHub Actions
Usage: IoTDeploy.exe <repository> <branch> <environment> [<port>] [--workflow <name|file>] [--useartifact <runId|latest>] [--artifact-name <name>]
Examples: IoTDeploy.exe MyFirmware main production COM3 --workflow deploy.yml IoTDeploy.exe MyApp main staging --workflow deploy.yml --useartifact latest IoTDeploy.exe MyApp main staging --workflow deploy.yml --useartifact 12345 --artifact-name publish
Notes: - <environment> is passed to the workflow as input 'environment'. - <port> is optional. If provided, it's passed to the workflow as input 'serial_port'. - --workflow targets a specific workflow file. If omitted and the repo has only one workflow, that one is used; if multiple workflows exist, --workflow is required. - --useartifact 'latest' resolves to the most recent successful run with a matching artifact on the branch. The resolved run_id is sent as input 'artifact_run_id' (and 'artifact_name'). - The target workflow must declare `on: workflow_dispatch:` with matching `inputs:`.
Configuration: appsettings.json and .pem file must be in the same folder as the exe.

data.name: ErrorInvalidArgs
data.value: Error: invalid arguments (expected 3 or 4 positional arguments + optional flags).

data.name: NoArtifactFound
data.value: No successful run with artifact '{0}' found on branch '{1}' in repository '{2}'.

data.name: WorkflowAmbiguous
data.value: Repository '{0}' has multiple workflows; --workflow is required. Available: {1}

data.name: WorkflowNotFound
data.value: Workflow '{0}' was not found in repository '{1}'. Available: {2}

data.name: DispatchFailed
data.value: Workflow dispatch failed: {0} The target workflow must declare `on: workflow_dispatch:` with matching `inputs:`.

data.name: AppSettingsNotFound
data.value: File appsettings.json not found. Place it in the application folder.

data.name: AppSettingsInvalid
data.value: File appsettings.json is empty or invalid.

data.name: FetchingJobLabels
data.value: Reading required labels from queued workflow run...

data.name: PemFileNotFound
data.value: GitHub App private key file not found (pattern: '{0}'). Place the file in the application folder or update PemFilePattern in appsettings.json.

data.name: AuthFailed
data.value: GitHub App authentication failed. Verify that the private key matches the App ID and installation.

data.name: InstallationNotFound
data.value: GitHub App installation with ID {0} was not found. Verify the installationId in the application settings.

data.name: BranchNotFound
data.value: Branch '{0}' was not found in repository '{1}'.

data.name: WaitingForApproval
data.value: Waiting for deployment approval on GitHub...

data.name: WaitingForWorkflow
data.value: Waiting for workflow approval and start... ({0}s)

data.name: WorkflowTimeout
data.value: Workflow was not approved and started within {0} minutes. Verify that the deployment was approved on GitHub and the runner is available.

data.name: RepositoryNotFoundOrNoActions
data.value: Repository '{0}' was not found or GitHub Actions is not enabled.
